articles.author: Stephen Clark
articles.title: Once again, ULA can’t deliver when the US military needs a satellite in orbit - Ars Technica
articles.description: ULA's Vulcan launch vehicle is grounded after a solid rocket booster anomaly last month.

articles.author: Sarah Perez
articles.title: WordPress.com now lets AI agents write and publish posts, and more - TechCrunch
articles.description: New AI agents on WordPress.com could lower barriers to publishing while increasing machine-generated content across the web.
articles.content: Web hosting platform WordPress.com is embracing AI agents, a decision that could change the look and feel of the web. The company announced Friday that it will now allow AI agents to draft, edit, and… [+3300 chars]
